name: core
description: Rosetta Core 2.0 for Codex. Bundles reusable skills, Rosetta MCP, and local references for rules and workflows.

interface.longDescription: Rosetta Core 2.0 for Codex. Includes reusable skills, Rosetta MCP configuration, and bundled local rules and workflow references generated from the core instruction set.
defaultPrompt: Use the load-context skill first, then consult rules/INDEX.md and workflows/INDEX.md from the Rosetta Core plugin bundle when you need local Rosetta guidance.
Use Rosetta Core for structured planning, coding, requirements, and validation workflows.
